message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam state {
  BackgroundColor<<initialize>> White
  BorderColor<<initialize>> Black
  FontColor<<initialize>> Black
}
skinparam state {
  BackgroundColor<<iterate>> White
  BorderColor<<iterate>> Black
  FontColor<<iterate>> Black
}

actor "record" as record
box "configuration" #LightGrey
end box
box "ekf" #LightGrey
end box
box "pathgenerator" #LightGrey
end box
box "display" #LightGrey
end box
box "diagnostics" #LightGrey
end box

rectangle "initialize" as initialize <<initialize>>
rectangle "iterate" as iterate <<iterate>>

note right of record: 1 Get inital configuration
note left of ekf: 2 Create Object
note left of pathgenerator: 3 Create Object
note right of ekf: 4 Get current location
note left of pathgenerator: 5 Send current location
note right of pathgenerator: 6 Return path
note left of display: 7 Path addition and walker location
note left of diagnostics: 8 Walker location and path status

@enduml
```
